data.title: SalMar ASA reports Q4 results
data.description:
• SalMar ASA press release (OTCPK:SALRF): Q4 GAAP EPS of NOK 7.30.
  • Revenue of NOK 7.88B (-1.7% Y/Y).

data.title: UK's unemployment rate steady at 4.4%
data.description:
UK's unemployment rate held steady at 4.4% from October to December 2024, lower than estimates of 4.5%.

This remains the highest level since the three months ending in May, driven by an increase in individuals unemployed for up to 12 months.

Meanwhile, the number of employed individuals rose by 107K to 33.86M, with a Y/Y growth in full-time and part-time employees. The number of people with second jobs also increased, now representing 3.8% of all employed individuals.

The economic activity rate edged lower to 21.5% from 21.6% in the preceding period.

ETFs: (FXB), (EWU), (FKU), (EWUS), (FLGB)

Currency: (GBP:USD)

data.title: Enagás, S.A. reports FY results
data.description:
• Enagás, S.A. press release (OTCPK:ENGGF): FY Net profit of €299.3M
  • Revenue of €913.2M (-0.7% Y/Y).
  • 2025 targets: Net profit ~€265M; Net Debt ~ €2.4B, EBITDA ~€670M,

data.title: KKR acquires stake in Employment Hero from SEEK Investments
data.description:
• KKR (NYSE:KKR) to acquire a stake in employment management solutions company Employment Hero from SEEK Investments, it said on Monday.
  • The transaction is expected to be completed by the first quarter of 2025.
  • Employment Hero has surpassed A$250 million in annual recurring revenue.

data.title: Antofagasta reports FY results
data.description:
• Antofagasta press release (OTC:ANFGF): FY Non-GAAP EPS of $62.80.
  • Revenue of $6.61B (+4.6% Y/Y) misses by $50M.
  • Continued strong safety performance, with no fatalities and the lost time injury frequency rate continuing at a level below 1.0.
  • Revenue increased by 5% to $6.6 billion, reflecting the higher copper price, partly offset by lower sales volumes due to the rescheduling of vessels between periods following adverse weather conditions(sea swells) during December 2024 in the north of Chile.
  • EBITDA was $3.4 billion, 11% higher on stronger revenues and robust cost control, which helped to increase the Group’s EBITDA margin2 to 52%.
  • Cash flow from operations increased by 8% to $3.3 billion, with the same drivers as described above.

data.title: Exodus Movement says offer to acquire Banxa Holdings has expired
data.description:
Exodus Movement (NYSE:EXOD) Monday said that its previously announced offer for the acquisition of all of the issued and outstanding common shares of Banxa Holdings (TSXV:BNXA:CA) has expired without reaching an agreement with Banxa.

Exodus will remain responsible stewards of capital with a disciplined approach to acquisitions.

data.title: Capgemini reports FY results
data.description:
• Capgemini press release (OTCPK:CAPMF): FY Non-GAAP EPS of €12.23
  • GAAP EPS of €9.47.
  • Revenue of €22.1B (-1.9% Y/Y).
  • Revenue growth at constant exchange rates* of -2.0% for the full year, and -1.1% in Q4
  • Bookings at €23.8 billion with a 1.08 book-to-bill
  • Stable operating margin*, at 13.3% of revenues
  • Net profit, Group share, up +0.5% and basic earnings per share up +1.2%
  • Organic free cash flow* of €1,961 million
  • Proposed dividend of €3.40 per share

data.title: Trust Stamp partners with Digital Platformer to strengthen security in digital identity, financial services
data.description:
Trust Stamp (NASDAQ:IDAI) and Digital Platformer have signed a Memorandum of Understanding establishing a strategic partnership to enhance financial security, identity authentication, and regulatory compliance across multiple industries, the companies said on Monday.

This planned strategic partnership aims to introduce a unified solution, leveraging advanced biometric authentication and decentralized technology to streamline onboarding, mitigate fraud risks, and ensure compliance.

data.title: Tesla is hiring India after Elon Musk met the Prime Minister
data.description:
Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has recently started hiring in India, signaling its intent to enter the market, following a recent meeting between CEO Elon Musk and Prime Minister Narendra Modi in the U.S.

The company has posted job openings for 13 roles on its LinkedIn page, including customer service and back-end operations, specifically roles such as service technicians, customer engagement managers, delivery operations specialists, inside sales advisor, and others in Mumbai and Delhi.

Recently, India reduced its customs duty on high-end vehicles priced above $40,000 from 110% to 70%, making the market more accessible for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA).

The recruitment follows the discussions held during Musk's meeting with Modi, further fueling speculations about Tesla's (TSLA) expansion plans in India.

data.title: Basilea Pharmaceutica GAAP EPS of CHF5.83, revenue of CHF208.5M; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Basilea Pharmaceutica AG press release (OTC:BPMUF): FY GAAP EPS of CHF 5.83.
  • Revenue of CHF 208.5M (+32.3% Y/Y).
  • Operating cash flow significantly increased to CHF 74M.
  • Basilea shows a net cash position of CHF 28.6m as of December 31, 2024 (December 31, 2023: net financial debt of CHF 46.6m). Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash amounted to CHF 124.6m as of December 31, 2024 (December 31, 2023: CHF 64.3m).
  • Outlook: 
    (in CHFm) FY 2025e FY 2024
    Cresemba and Zevtera-related revenue ~190 194.8
    of which royalty income ~110 96.7

    Research & development expenses, net ~88 77.1
